Rhetorical Devices

📅 May 18, 2021

There are few things I enjoy more than listening to a good public speaker. Reading this list today I noted that one of the points is that:

People can’t remember more than 3 points from a speech.

People who make good speeches often, either consciously or unconsciously, making use of time-honoured rhetorical devices. I thought I'd start a post as an aide-memoire to the devices I've learnt about and examples I read or heard. I'll add to this periodically as I come across new ones:
